overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene showing a hooded character standing on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, gazing at a distant snow-capped peak across a forested valley with a lake. The camera remains steady behind the character as clouds drift and birds occasionally fly through the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain vista overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: flock of birds enters the frame from the left, flying across the sky
clouds shift position, altering the golden light rays across the mountain peak

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands motionless on the cliff edge, gazing at the distant mountain vista with slight cloak movement in the wind

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the sky in loose formation

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow-covered summit, backlit by golden sunlight creating a silhouette
stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the valley below
dense green forest covering the valley floor between mountain ranges
calm body of water visible in the valley to the right of the frame
vertical wooden marker or fence post on the left side near the character
thick clouds with golden edges from the setting sun, creating god rays and dramatic lighting

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, facing a breathtaking vista of snow-capped peaks, forested valleys, and a distant lake. Birds occasionally fly through the dramatic cloud-filled sky as the wind gently moves the character's cloak, creating a serene and contemplative atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, contemplative gaze from a rocky mountain overlook during the golden hour, capturing a vast and serene wilderness. It begins with the hooded character standing still, their cloak gently swaying in the wind while facing a breathtaking vista of snow-capped peaks and forested valleys. As the camera lingers, the dramatic cloud-filled sky becomes active with birds occasionally gliding through the frame. The scene then settles into a quiet observation of the distant lake nestled within the valley, emphasizing the stillness of the landscape under the warm, shifting light.
